# Guy

An educational English grammar quiz platform targeting Hebrew-speaking learners. The content focuses on teaching verb tenses — Present Simple, Past Simple, Present Continuous, and Future Simple — through structured multiple-choice questions with contextual hints written in Hebrew. The platform has a clear pedagogical approach, guiding students to identify time-marker clues (e.g., 'last night', 'right now', 'next week') to choose the correct verb form.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Master Verb Tenses with Google Workspace for Education — Guy

URL: https://example.com
Description: Unlock English grammar mastery for Hebrew speakers! Practice verb tenses with smart quizzes, contextual hints, and department of education-aligned lessons. Start now!

Master Verb Tenses with Google Workspace for Education — Guy

English Grammar Mastery




# Master English Verb Tenses — One Clue at a Time



### Spot time markers like "last night", "right now", and "next week" — then choose the correct tense with guided multiple-choice quizzes and structured hints.





Start Your Grammar Journey


Explore the Method






Past Simple
Present Simple
Present Continuous
Future Simple


















How It Works

## Four Pillars of Grammar Mastery


A structured, clue-driven approach to English verb tenses — designed specifically for Hebrew-speaking learners who want clarity, confidence, and real results.













### Structured Multiple-Choice Practice


Every question is carefully engineered with four answer options that target the most common learner errors. You're never guessing — you're reasoning through grammar patterns with guided scaffolding at every step.











### Clue-Word Recognition Methodology


Learn to spot time-marker signals like "last night", "right now", and "next week" that unlock the correct tense instantly. This pedagogical approach transforms grammar from memorization into active pattern detection.











### Hebrew-Language Contextual Hints


Stuck on a question? Each exercise includes a contextual hint written in Hebrew — like "חפש את מילת הרמז 'last year'" — so you always have a native-language anchor to guide your thinking without giving away the answer.











### All Four Core Tenses Covered


From Present Simple and Past Simple to Present Continuous and Future Simple — every essential tense is covered with dedicated question sets. Build a complete grammar foundation that transfers directly to real-world English communication.























Why It Works

## Stop Guessing.Start Reading Context.


Our method trains you to spot the hidden time-marker clues in every sentence — so you stop guessing verb forms and start recognising the logic behind English tenses with confidence.








### Clarity Through Context


Words like "last night", "right now", and "next week" are your compass. We train your eye to find these clues instantly, so the correct tense becomes obvious — not a guess.











### Deep Retention, Not Memorisation


Repeated exposure to structured sentence patterns — built around real tense logic — rewires how your brain stores grammar. You remember because you understood, not because you drilled.











### Exam-Ready Accuracy


Every question is calibrated for real exam conditions. By the time you sit your test, identifying Present Simple, Past Simple, Present Continuous, and Future Simple feels second nature — like a native speaker's instinct.














The 3-Step Method

How every question teaches you to think





01


### Spot the Time Marker


Scan the sentence for clue words. "last year" anchors you in the past. "right now" signals the present continuous.


Example clue
"...when he was in London  last year ?"











02


### Identify the Tense Family


Match the clue to its tense category. Past markers → Past Simple. Ongoing action markers → Present Continuous. Habitual facts → Present Simple.


Past Simple
Present Simple
Continuous
Future Simple











03


### Select the Correct Verb Form


With the tense locked in, apply the rule: questions revert to base form, negatives use auxiliary verbs. Accuracy becomes logical, not lucky.


does / live
did / live
is / living



























Real Learners, Real Results

## Tenses Finally Make Sense


Hebrew-speaking learners of all backgrounds are building grammar confidence — one time clue at a time. Here's what they're saying.










"

I used to mix up Past Simple and Present Perfect all the time. The hint system — pointing me to clues like  'last night'  or  'yesterday'  — completely changed how I read sentences. I finally understand  why  the answer is correct.



ד


Dana Levi
University ESL Student, Tel Aviv



Past






"

As someone who learned English later in life, I always felt unsure about continuous tenses. Guy's platform is like having a patient tutor — the Hebrew hints make the logic click immediately. My answers are so much more accurate now.



מ


Moshe Katz
Adult Learner, Improving Business English



Now






"

I moved abroad and needed to refresh my grammar fast. The structured multiple-choice format with contextual hints is perfect — it feels like a proper education tool, not just a random quiz app. Future Simple was always my weak spot; not anymore.



נ


Noa Shapiro
Israeli Expat, London



Next








Improved confidence in tense recognition

·


Easier identification of time-marker clues

·


More accurate answers in every practice session

·


Trusted by Hebrew-speaking learners worldwide

























By the Numbers

## Built for Real Learning,Proven by Structure


Every lesson is grounded in a clear pedagogical method — teaching Hebrew-speaking learners to identify time-marker clues and master English verb tenses with confidence.








4

### Core Tense Worlds


Present Simple, Past Simple, Present Continuous & Future Simple — each with its own visual learning environment.






100 +

### Structured Questions


Multiple-choice exercises with four answer options, each crafted to expose the most common learner errors.






∞

### Contextual Clue Words


Time markers like last night, right now, and next week are embedded as pedagogical anchors in every question.






עב

### Hebrew-First Hints


Every question includes a native-language hint — so learners understand the why, not just the answer, supporting education for all levels.




















Get In Touch

## Have Questions About the Platform?


Whether you're curious about our teaching method, want to explore the quiz format, or need to find the right learning path — we're here to help. Reach out and we'll respond promptly.


- ### Personalized Guidance Ask us how the platform adapts to your current English level and learning pace.

- ### Our Teaching Approach Learn how we use time-marker clues and Hebrew context hints to make verb tenses click.

- ### Explore the Quiz Format Curious about the multiple-choice structure? We'll walk you through how each quiz session is built.

No commitment required — just say hello.

Join thousands of Hebrew-speaking learners who have discovered the confidence of reading time-marker clues and choosing the right verb form — every time. Guided quizzes, contextual hints, and a clear pedagogical path await you.

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/13/2026



Guy ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Guy

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 13, 2026



Guy is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Guy

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 13, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Guy

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - education provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Guy provides education through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Guy. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Guy

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
